title: THE 15 BEST Things to Do in Seattle (2026) - Must-See Attractions
content: # Top Things to Do in Seattle, WA - Seattle Attractions. # Top Things to Do in Seattle. ### Mt. Rainier National Park Highlights Tour. ### Chef Guided Food Tour of Pike Place Market. ### Boeing Factory Tour with Guided Transport from Seattle. ### Seattle City Highlights Tour. ### Mt. Rainier Day Tour from Seattle. ## Outdoor activities in Seattle. According to forum posts, solo travelers have several sightseeing options in Seattle. For those interested in unique experiences, the Seattle City Pass offers access to multiple attractions, and ferry rides or float plane excursions provide scenic views of the surrounding areas. Solo travelers have also recommended the Seattle free walking tour and food tours at Pike Place Market. According to forum posts, first-time visitors to Seattle should not miss the Space Needle, Pike Place Market, and the Chihuly Glass Garden. Some users have recommended the Underground Tour in Pioneer Square for a unique historical perspective of the city.
